title: Close CRM vs Freshdesk
description: Compare Close CRM vs Freshdesk in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right crm & sales tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Close CRM emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.3/5 rating compared to 4.3/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Close CRM or Freshdesk?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Close CRM edges ahead with a 4.3/5 rating. Close CRM excels at Built-in phone and email sales CRM for SMBs and startups., while Freshdesk is stronger for Freshdesk is a crm & sales platform that helps Support Teams and SMBs and Enterp.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Close CRM and Freshdesk?
faqs.answer: Close CRM and Freshdesk differ in pricing ($25-79/mo vs Free – $35/agent/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Close CRM cheaper than Freshdesk?
faqs.answer: Close CRM starts at $25-79/mo while Freshdesk starts at Free – $35/agent/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Close CRM or Freshdesk?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for crm & sales. Close CRM scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Close CRM and Freshdesk together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Close CRM or Freshdesk?
faqs.answer: Both Close CRM and Freshdesk prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which crm & sales tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Freshdesk for large teams, while Close CRM may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $25-79/mo pricing.
